calendar.description: Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing
House Law Enforcement and Criminal Justice Hearing

general_provisions: This bill concerns a law enforcement officer's ability to tamper with a surveillance camera on private property.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>prohibits a law enforcement officer, or an individual acting on behalf of a law enforcement officer, from tampering with, changing the viewing direction of, or disabling a person's surveillance camera on the person's private property; and<hr><ltbullet>creates exceptions to the prohibition.
